content:
CrossFit W.O.D
Strength:
5 SuperSets:
5\5 Weighted Box Step Ups
15m 1KB Overhead Carry (Per arm)

Metcon:
For Time:
21-15-9
Deadlifts #100/70kg
Lateral Burpees Over The Bar

CrossFit Endurance
Every 05:00MOMx6 Rounds:
30m Burpee Broad Jumps
30 KB Swings #16/12kg
20 1KB Front Rack Squats
15m 1KB Goblet Walking Lunges
**Rest For The Remaining.
